chapter_title.en: Chapter on Offspring, Milking, and Riding of Sacrificial Animals

text: 3087 - وَ رَوَى مَنْصُورُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَحْلُبُ اَلْبَدَنَةَ وَ يَحْمِلُ عَلَيْهَا غَيْرَ مُضِرٍّ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3087 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Imam Ali (as) used to milk the sacrificial camel and allow others to ride it, provided it was not harmed."
